subcodes.first_line: O My Pen! I bear witness that thou hast not fallen short in that which thou wert commanded by God, the Lord of all worlds. Indeed, thy shrill voice hath been raised aloft [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا قلمی اشهد انک ماقصرت فیما امرت به من لدی الله رب العالمین قد ارتفع صریرک
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @suffering and imprisonment, @the concourse on high
